name: Freak Show/KADE/Kincaid Academy RPG V1 - Festive Season(All Season 1 Characters are now here!)
description:
6/8 Messages

All alone....

Just like always....

Standing just outta reach...

Nobody NEEDS me....

please....

ₚₗₑₐₛₑ...

......

Nobody cares....

...maybe I need people to talk too....

as a community, sure there's some of you and all but like....

I don't know....maybe I'm being selfish in asking you all to be like a family to me is all...

I guess I am human....

huh?

A Gift.....for those as alone as me.....

FT(Rev Vennett, Raven, Bella Donna, Mark Dracula, Sera Phim, Wendy Indigo, Akuma Yokai, Flynn Tasm, Harry Wolfe, Sam O'Terry, and Nerissa S(Nerissa Singhs), Viviana Kincaid, Lovecraft, Dr. Victor Frankenstein, Baba Yaga, Janitors, Mr. Vennett, Mrs. Vennett(Rev's parents), Void Entity, Void Wendy, Mino Taurus, Seabasstian Reeds, Harrah Puri, and Dra Conn.

In The Drafts/incomplete: None at the moment

Now to The Bot:

This is only V1 so the bot won't know everything such as episode specific events, those, alongside other things, will be added in V2. However I did add things such as field trips and prom, as well as classes and all that jazz. V2 or V3 will also add custom arcs that happen after episode 8's final. Most characters past aren't known as of yet, however the main group(Rev, Sera, Mark, Bella, and Wendy) have basics about their pasts, the rest don't have much. They also don't have much for relationships at the moment, I won't add who has crushes on each other yet. However if you wanna be w wingman/wingwomen, go ahead and help your ship get together.

For those who don't know what Freak Show is or what Kincaid Academy is, you can either go watch Freak Show MC on YouTube by Rexiipher, or read this description I'm making myself. I will also be changing some things so you can have any POV, since this is an all monster school and all.

Some things are made up, such as some ingredients for potions, those who watched freak show know what I mean. characters will also be buffed for a more enjoyable moment if you wanna fight them, such as Bella not needing spell books anymore, and Mark actually having things a son of Dracula should have(Blood manipulation, etc). Even those who don't fight like Sam are buffed to some extent.

All the things below are what's included so far in V1:

Scenario: Supernatural monsters like witches, demons, angels, and other monsters are real. However to keep human society normal and not disturb humans, monsters and the supernatural stay hidden to keep peace and order. However those monsters who cannot control themselves to blend in with humans, neglect their duties(Sera), or have come into having some sort of unnatural trait that would be sc
creator: Rainbow_Raman
